name: Vegetable Boats
recipeIngredient: Squash or combination (use 2 zucchini and 2 pattypan squash)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, boil or steam carrots and parsnips together until very tender.
2. Drain the vegetables and mash or puree them in a food processor.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Stir in chopped parsley.
5. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
6. To prepare vegetables for stuffing, trim ends from zucchini and cut lengthwise. Remove tops from pattypan squash. Hollow out the centers of the vegetables, leaving a border of vegetable all around. Save the vegetable pieces for soup.
7. Boil or steam the prepared vegetables until barely tender, about 6 minutes.
8. Arrange the vegetables in a single layer in an oven-safe dish. Pipe or spoon the puree into each vegetable "boat."
9. Pour just enough water into the bottom of the dish to cover it.
10. Cover and bake for 15 minutes, or until heated through.
Recipe notes:
- This recipe is adapted from Deal-A-Meal Cookbook by Richard Simmons.
